extraction.one_line_summary: IZAGIRRE Ion attacked from the breakaway with 15km remaining, soloing to victory while BERNAL Egan managed QUINTANA Nairo's 50km-out move to seal overall by 39 seconds.
tactical_patterns: QUINTANA Nairo attacked 50km out with teammates SOLER Marc and ANACONA Winner ahead to relay, gaining virtual lead.
Team Sky allowed 40-rider break containing top GC threats JUNGELS Bob, YATES Simon, ZAKARIN Ilnur to establish before controlling.
IZAGIRRE Ion counterattacked VAN GARDEREN Tejay late from leading group, gaining 20 seconds immediately on descent into Nice.
Bonus seconds at intermediate sprint crucial: QUINTANA collected three seconds, briefly becoming virtual leader before Sky's chase.

rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: defended 45-second lead against sustained 50km QUINTANA attack using team tempo control rather than responding personally
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: long-range 50km move with positioned teammates showed aggressive tactics but only clawed back 7 seconds on stage
rider_signals.IZAGIRRE Ion: positive: timed counterattack from breakaway perfectly with 15km left, demonstrating superior late-race positioning over VAN GARDEREN
rider_signals.VAN GARDEREN Tejay: negative: went clear alone from break but lacked punch to hold off IZAGIRRE's late counter
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michał: neutral: rolled in hand-in-hand with BERNAL, finishing third overall while providing critical domestique support
